quotes.selection: True art is something that lasts forever.
general: Puppets will never betray you, unlike humans.
My body is eternal. I will never wither like the rest of you.
Do you think emotions have a place on the battlefield?
Mother… Father… I no longer need to feel pain.
My puppets will carve your end into eternity.
You will only understand my art when you're in pieces.
Eternal beauty exists only in art that does not decay.
Human emotions are fragile… my puppets are everlasting.
The Red Sand will be your grave.

Deidara ID to be specified: Deidara, your explosions fade too quickly. My art never dies.

hiruko.description: Melee bruiser puppet shell. Enhanced defenses with poison and taunt abilities.

passive.name: Puppet Armor: Hiruko
passive.description: Sasori begins inside Hiruko puppet form granting enhanced defenses. When Hiruko's health is depleted, Sasori emerges in Sasori form. Hiruko cannot be restored until Sasori dies and respawns.

h1.name: Poison Shrapnel
h1.description: Hiruko fires a burst of poisoned needles from its left arm in a cone.

h2.name: Iron Carapace
h2.description: Passive magic shield that regenerates after 12/10/8 seconds without damage. Active: Charge up to 2 seconds for damage reduction, radius, and taunt duration scaling. Recast to refresh reduction and taunt nearby enemies with static slow.

damageReduction.magic: 25 / 30 / 35 / 40 / 45% (+ 4% per 100 AP, + 8% per 100 bonus MR, + 1% per 100 bonus health)

h3.name: Tail Strike
h3.description: Hiruko launches its scorpion-like tail in a long line. First enemy hit takes damage and is inflicted with Grievous Wounds.

sasori.description: Ranged puppet master. Commands puppets to attack and defend with ranged capability.

h1.name: Puppet Rush
h1.description: Sasori commands up to 2 closest puppets to dash toward target location, damaging all enemies passed through and those in front on arrival, applying slow.

h2.name: Puppet Deployment
h2.description: Sasori summons puppet at target location (untargetable, 10s duration, grants vision). Puppet expiry doubles near enemy turrets, instant if Sasori too far. When Sasori attacks, puppet attacks instead with spear thrust applying on-hit effects.

puppetAttack.onHitEffects: Applied to primary target, 50% reduced on others

effects.restrictions: Puppets cannot attack structures, wards, nor traps

h3.name: Defensive Recall
h3.description: Sasori commands up to 2 closest puppets to dash back to his position, intercepting attacks, dealing damage and shielding him.

h4.name: Third Kazekage
h4.description: Sasori summons the puppet of the Third Kazekage, ultimate weapon remaining until it or Sasori dies. Acts semi-autonomously, prioritizing Sasori's targets. Can recast after 10s to set free pushing nearest lane.

recast.effect: Set Third Kazekage free to push nearest lane until death

lore:
Sasori of the Red Sand was a prodigious puppet master from Sunagakure, feared for turning his victims into lifeless weapons. From a young age, he displayed genius in creating and controlling puppets, surpassing all his predecessors by inventing human puppets infused with the abilities of their original owners. His most infamous creation was the puppet of the Third Kazekage, which he wielded as his ultimate weapon. To eliminate his own fragility, Sasori transformed his body into a puppet shell, granting himself near-immortality while housing his true core within a container.

Cold, calculating, and detached from human emotion, Sasori sought eternal art in the perfection of puppetry, rejecting fleeting forms of beauty. Though a member of Akatsuki, he acted more as a craftsman obsessed with control and permanence than a traditional shinobi. His abilities made him a terrifying fighter: commanding swarms of puppets at once, wielding deadly poisons, and fighting with an eerie calm. Sasori's tragedy lay in his humanity buried beneath layers of wood and steel, a boy who lost his parents and chose eternal stillness over the pain of impermanence.
